sourcesContent:
import { principles } from '../data/siteData'; import './Philosophy.css'; const Philosophy = () => (
Our Philosophy

How we think
about building.

These aren't slogans — they're the principles we actually make decisions by. Every product, every line of code, every design choice runs through these filters.

{principles.map((p, i) => (
{p.num}

{p.title}

{p.desc}

))}
); export default Philosophy;
